description_long: This object consists of a slice of light brown bread topped with a cooked sunny-side-up egg. The bread has a soft, slightly raised crust and a pale, porous interior, with a square shape and rounded corners. The egg sits centrally on the bread, with a white, slightly irregularly shaped egg white and a round, yellow yolk that is slightly off-center. Small green flecks, possibly representing herbs or seasoning, are scattered on the egg white. The surface of the bread appears matte and slightly textured, while the egg white is smoother with a subtle sheen. The overall appearance suggests a simple, ready-to-eat breakfast item.
description: A slice of light brown bread topped with a sunny-side-up egg, featuring a yellow yolk and scattered green flecks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bread's crust and the egg centered on top, with the yolk and green flecks clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the bread and the edge of the egg, with a bite-like notch visible on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back crust of the bread and the egg's placement, with the yolk slightly off-center.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the bread's thickness and the egg's edge, with the bite-like notch now on the left.
attribute_orientation: lying flat with the egg facing upward
attribute_contextual_placement: Most likely encountered as part of a casual breakfast or snack, possibly outdoors or in a street food setting.
attribute_decorative_patterns: scattered green flecks on the egg white
